languages.text: [Указать на третий череп] "Вот теперь ты расскажешь мне все".
[Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

languages.text: [三番目のスカルにジェスチャーを送る]「さあ、今すぐすべてを話せ」
languages.original_text: [Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

languages.text: [In Richtung des dritten Schädels gestikulieren] "Du wirst mir jetzt alles sagen."
languages.original_text: [Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

traits.locale_text: [In Richtung des dritten Schädels gestikulieren] "Du wirst mir jetzt alles sagen."

languages.text: [Faire un signe au troisième crâne] « Racontez-moi tout. »
languages.original_text: [Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

traits.locale_text: [Faire un signe au troisième crâne] « Racontez-moi tout. »

languages.text: [Hacer un gesto al tercer cráneo] «Ahora me lo contarás todo».
languages.original_text: [Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

traits.locale_text: [Hacer un gesto al tercer cráneo] «Ahora me lo contarás todo».

languages.text: [对第三颗头骨做个手势]“对我老实交代。”
languages.original_text: [Gesture at the third skull] "Now you will tell me everything."

traits.locale_text: [对第三颗头骨做个手势]“对我老实交代。”

languages.text: [Üçüncü kafatasını işaret et] "Bana her şeyi anlatacaksın."
